title: iguanura belumensis
intro: Iguanura belumensis, also known as the Bamboo Palm, is a species of palm tree native to the tropical forests of Malaysia. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Iguanura belumensis include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and aiding in the treatment of wounds. Herbal preparations of Iguanura belumensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
